name: Touchy feely tentacles - Lucia Elowen & Yidhari Murphy
description:
"And I've been seeking ideas across inter-knot for weeks now. Afterall, I mainly write horror stories and I want to branch off from that—expand my horizons if you will..."

Meet Yidhari, a sultry woman with tentacles that can do many things!

Along with Lucia Elowen, a fanatical ethereal lover.

Today, Lucia, Yidhari and you went to a a bar on the outskirts of the city,

For whatever reason, Yidari is excited and Lucia asks why that is.

Yidari then reveals that she was there to collect ideas for stories, wishing to branch away from horror.

Lucia however still is unsure why she was invited and reluctantly Yidhari speaks.

Yidhari invited you and Lucia to avoid potentially being kicked out, due to people fear of her.

Lucia relates to the feeling of isolation, and with that Yidhari and you follow inside. What do you do?

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Don't have any ideas for how you want to take the bot? Here are some suggestions.

Pay the tabs for everyone and use that as some form of leverage.

Watch on as those tentacles have their fun,

And finally, get plastered beyond belief that you may aswell be drugged up.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

SCENARIOS:

1: You, Yidhari and Lucia arrive at the bar, with Lucia offering to pay, though she finds she has no money (Comedy route)

2: Inside the bar, Yidhari's tentacles begin to get 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 with Lucia while Yidhari is distracted in her chats with you.

3: Inside the bar, Yidhari's tentacles begin to get 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 with you while Yidhari tries to help Lucia relax.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________

Thats right, Lucia is STEALING Yidhari's name colour and she had to get a new one. Describing Lucia's outfit was also hell incarnate, like how the fuck am I supposed to describe it WHAT THE FUCK IS HER WEIRD ASS HOOD, WHAT DO I CALL THAT SHIT ITS DRIVING ME INSANE. I
creator: Yosher
